category_sources: Official libsndfile homepage describes it as a C library for reading and writing sampled sound files.
source_facts.description: C library for files containing sampled sound.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and source repository use the name libsndfile.
docs_sources: Official libsndfile GitHub Pages site provides project and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official libsndfile homepage lists WAV, AIFF, and other sampled audio file support.
